content.speakerText: So what do you do? I'm in tech, but I'm trying to branch out.
content.speakerTextCn: 那你做什么工作？我在科技行业，但想拓展一下。
expectedAnswers: I'm a graphic designer. I work with small businesses on logos and websites.
I'm in finance, but I've been taking design courses on the side—I'm thinking of switching.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确回应了对方的职业提问
语言准确性：语法是否正确，用词是否恰当
表达自然度：是否像母语者一样流畅自然
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景关键词如design, work, switch, branch out

content.speakerText: Cool! How'd you get into that field?
content.speakerTextCn: 太棒了！你是怎么入行的？
expectedAnswers: I did a few internships and built a portfolio online. That’s how I got my first clients.
Honestly, I just started posting my work on Instagram—and people started reaching out.
It’s kind of a long story. Maybe we can grab coffee sometime?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了入行经历的提问，不回避问题
语言准确性：动词时态和搭配是否正确（e.g., did internships, built a portfolio）
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化表达（e.g., kind of, grabbing coffee）
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景关键词如started, internships, portfolio, reach out

content.speakerTextCn: 你今天来这儿是为什么？
expectedAnswers: I'm attending the creative workshop—I'm a freelance illustrator.
I came to meet some people in the design community. I'm looking to switch careers.
I heard this was a great place to network, so I thought I'd check it out.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰说明来意并自然关联个人背景
语言准确性：介词使用（e.g., attending, in, to）和时态是否准确
表达自然度：是否避免机械背诵，有口语节奏感
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景关键词如network, switch, community, attend
